backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Chrpz social media platform, defining core data types (Post, UserProfile, Wallet, Comment, etc.) and integrating blob storage, access control, Stripe payments, HTTP outcalls, and user approval modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the USA-themed color scheme update (red, white, blue) was applied to frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key functionality of each component, hook, and utility in the frontend.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the Chrpz frontend, setting up the page title, meta description, favicon, and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component that configures React Query, TanStack Router (with routes for home, profile, and wallet), theme provider, Internet Identity, and global toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ActivityFeed.tsx: Empty file with no content or implementation.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel component with tabs for managing user registration approvals and post moderation (flag, unflag, delete, bulk delete) with filtering by reported or flagged status.
frontend/src/components/AdminWalletManag: Empty file with no content or implementation.
frontend/src/components/AppInitializer.t: Initialization wrapper component that waits for the actor and Internet Identity to be ready, ensures the user's wallet exists, and shows a loading screen or warning banner if initialization times out or fails.
frontend/src/components/AuthModal.tsx: Authentication modal offering Internet Identity login and email-based login options, with error handling and a shared ICP wallet note.
frontend/src/components/BaseModal.tsx: A reusable modal component with configurable size, optional title, and close button, rendered as a centered overlay with backdrop blur.
frontend/src/components/Comment.tsx: Empty file with no content or implementation.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Displays and manages comments for a post, supporting adding and deleting comments with identity-based auth and toast notifications.
Empty file with no content or implementation.
A modal dialog for creating new posts with support for text content, links, hashtags, media uploads, public/paywalled videos, and paywall links.
frontend/src/components/EditPostModal.ts: A modal dialog for editing existing posts, allowing updates to content, links, hashtags, and management of existing and new media including paywalled videos and links.
frontend/src/components/EmailAuthModal.t: A UI-complete modal for email-based sign-in and registration with password validation, but backend authentication methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: A React class-based error boundary that catches runtime errors and displays a fallback UI with options to reload or hard refresh the application.
frontend/src/components/ForumTab.tsx: Empty file with no content or implementation.
Empty file with no content or implementation.
Empty file with no content or implementation.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, profile/admin/sign-out buttons for authenticated users, and a sign-in button for unauthenticated users. Includes an inline Admin Panel dialog and routes via TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/LockedVideoOverl: Overlay card displayed over paywalled videos showing price in ICP, user wallet balance, and an unlock button that calls the unlock paywall mutation.
frontend/src/components/MainContent.tsx: Main feed page showing a welcome section, a create-post button for authenticated users, and a sortable list of posts (by latest, most liked, or most commented).
frontend/src/components/PaywallLinkSecti: Renders a list of premium paywall links for a post, each with price display and an unlock button that triggers the unlock paywall mutation.
frontend/src/components/PaywallTab.tsx: Page tab listing all posts with paywall links, with an optional create-paywall-link form that redirects users to create a post with paywall content instead.
frontend/src/components/PostActions.tsx: Action bar for a post providing like/unlike, comment, and tip buttons with authentication guards and a TipModal for sending tips.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Renders a social media post card with like, delete, report, edit, comment, tip, and rating actions, using Internet Identity for auth and React Query mutations for backend calls.
frontend/src/components/PostMedia.tsx: Displays a grid of images and a list of videos for a post using direct URLs from ExternalBlob objects.
frontend/src/components/PostMetadata.tsx: Renders clickable external links and hashtag badges associated with a post.
Full-page profile and wallet view showing the authenticated user's display name, bio, principal, and account ID with copy-to-clipboard support.
frontend/src/components/RatingDisplay.ts: Interactive 5-star rating component that lets authenticated users rate a post and displays the current average rating and count.
frontend/src/components/TipButton.tsx: Button that opens a TipModal for sending crypto tips to a post's author, requiring the user to be signed in.
frontend/src/components/TipModal.tsx: Dialog for sending ICP or imported token tips to a post, with token selection, quick-amount buttons, balance display, and validation before submitting.
frontend/src/components/UserAvatar.tsx: Reusable avatar component that renders a profile image or a fallback User icon in multiple configurable sizes with optional click handler.
frontend/src/components/UserProfileModal: Deprecated stub that re-exports nothing; functionality moved to ProfileEditPage.tsx.
Modal dialog that loads and displays a user's public profile (name, bio, follower count) and allows the authenticated viewer to follow or unfollow them.
frontend/src/components/UserProfileSetup: A modal form component for new user registration that collects name, bio, and newsletter preference, then submits via the `useRegisterUser` hook and shows a pending approval screen on success.
frontend/src/components/VideoPaywallUplo: A form component that lets users select a video file, set an ICP price, and add an optional description before calling the `onVideoAdded` callback to attach paywalled video content to a post.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: Renders a video player for a post, showing a paywall lock screen with an unlock button (ICP payment) if the content is paywalled and the user lacks access, otherwise displaying the video directly.
A full wallet dashboard page displaying the user's ICP wallet address, balance, imported tokens, and modals for receiving funds and importing custom token canisters.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAppState.ts: A hook that manages top-level UI state (create post visibility, profile view, feed tab, sort order) and exposes handler callbacks for navigation and state transitions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook that wrap the DFINITY `AuthClient` to manage login, logout, and identity persistence for Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfilePicture.ts: File is empty with no content.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks (useQuery/useMutation) for all backend interactions including user profiles, wallets, posts, tips, and paywall operations. Some mutations like registerUser are stubbed with not-implemented errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useSorting.ts: Exports memoized sorting hooks for arrays of sortable items, supporting 'latest' (by timestamp) and 'likes' (by likedBy length) sort criteria, including a variant for multiple named groups.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet using Tailwind CSS with a USA-themed (navy/red/white) CSS variable color scheme, custom glassmorphism utility classes, and a custom scrollbar style.
frontend/src/lib/accountId.ts: Converts an ICP Principal to a hex-encoded Account ID using SHA-224 (truncated SHA-256) and CRC32, following the ICP account identifier standard, with fallback logic for errors.
frontend/src/lib/blobCache.ts: Client-side media caching utility using the Cache API with a 7-day expiry, supporting fetch-with-retry, progress callbacks, cache initialization/cleanup, and blob URL creation.
frontend/src/lib/mediaUpload.ts: Handles file-to-ExternalBlob conversion with optional progress callbacks, plus helper functions to detect video/image files by extension.
frontend/src/lib/passwordHash.ts: Provides SHA-256 password hashing via Web Crypto API and utility functions for email validation and password strength checking/messaging.
frontend/src/lib/qrcode.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file, likely a placeholder for QR code library type definitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page component that conditionally renders UserProfileSetup for authenticated users without a profile, or the standard Header and MainContent layout otherwise.
frontend/src/types.ts: Re-exports backend-derived types and defines additional frontend-only types: Comment, PostReport, TokenRegistryEntry, and ImportedToken.
frontend/src/types/index.ts: Defines frontend-only TypeScript interfaces for core data models including UserProfile, Wallet, Post, Comment, Tip, PaywallLink, PaywalledVideo, ImportedToken, PostReport, and TokenRegistryEntry.
frontend/src/utils/dateUtils.ts: Exports a single utility function `formatDistanceToNow` that converts a nanosecond timestamp to a human-readable relative time string (e.g., '3 days ago').
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode support, CSS variable-based color tokens, custom font (Inter), border radius variables, and two custom box-shadow glow utilities.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Chrpz ICP social media project, documenting existing features, known issues (build size limits, no App Market publishing), and a pending request to apply a USA-themed color scheme.
